task: take the chicken off the grill
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black grill with a lid is on a wooden surface. A red chicken is on the grill grates. The chicken is a solid object with a body. STRATEGY - First, reach for the chicken to grasp it. Then, lift it off the grill. Finally, place it on the wooden surface. Failure modes include not grasping the chicken properly or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the chicken body; Step 2 grasp the chicken body for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the wooden surface; Step 4 lower onto the wooden surface.**
Goal: on(chicken, wooden_surface); stable(chicken)
Scene: grill, chicken, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the red chicken
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chicken, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chicken) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(chicken)
  affordance_region: the body of the red chicken
  contact: holding(chicken) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(chicken)
Step 3: transport(chicken -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  spatial: above(chicken, wooden_surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(chicken)
  done_when: above(chicken, wooden_surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(chicken -> wooden_surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface
  contact: surface_contact(chicken, wooden_surface) [completion]; released(chicken) [completion]
  pose: stable(chicken) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(chicken, wooden_surface) AND released(chicken)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red chicken
the body of the red chicken
an empty area on the wooden surface
an empty area on the wooden surface
